DATA

My name is Kristýna Kramer. Until recently, I was a mathematician working in research positions at various universities. Now I am aspiring to become a data scientist.

On this webpage, you can find my portfolio projects and online certifications. If you want to know more about my scientific journey as a mathematician, go to the MATH section.

I am also an avid hiker, so there are some photos from my travels dispersed around this webpage.

Hiking Abel Tasman Coast Track (New Zealand)

E-mail: kristyna[dot]kramer[at]gmail[dot]com
